results.rendered_html:
vy-ā-√yam P. Ā. -yacchati, ˚te, (P.) to pull or drag or draw asunder, extend,  Lāṭy. ;
to sport or dally with (loc.),  Suśr. ;
Ā. (P. only mc.) to struggle or contend about (loc.), fight together, make efforts, strive, endeavour,  TS. ;  Br. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Caus. yāmayati or yamayati, to cause to stretch out or struggle, make great effort or exertion, take exercise (ind.p. -yāmya, having taken exercise),  Mn. vii, 216.
